productDisplayName: Myntra Men Rodeo Off White T-shirt
description: Composition Off white T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves with stitch detail and a graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Wash in cold water; wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, do not soak, do not wring Warm iron, iron print on reverse Spun from our irresistibly soft cotton, this is a blissfully cosy T-shirt. Sporting a print on the chest, this tee from myntra gives a fresh twist to an off-duty staple making it ideal for your cool summer uniform. Style it with checked shorts, understated accessories and lace up casual shoes for perfect man-about-town nonchalance. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
